recommendations._audit_notes: Probate-cost range based on GA attorney fees 1-3% on assumed $5M probate estate (East Cobb home, Blue Ridge, brokerage). Foundational rec — primary value is enabling downstream irrevocable trusts.

estimate.narrative_context: Direct attorney fee for full document set; avoidance value (probate, conservatorship, family disputes) substantially larger

scenario_range.computation_method: Attorney-fee range for full HNW estate document set

action_items.description: Estate attorney drafts complete document set: wills, DPOAs, healthcare directives, HIPAA, guardianship designation for Sophie.
sub_steps: Guardianship designation naming guardian for Sophie (age 12)

action_items.description: Notarize and witness all documents per Georgia execution requirements.
Distribute copies to providers, agents, successor trustees, and PSA file.
Execute Olivia's HIPAA and healthcare POA — she is 19 and parents have no default access.

recommendations._audit_notes: Wills dated 2014 (12 yrs stale), no DPOA, no HIPAA, no healthcare directive, Sophie (12) has no named guardian, Olivia (19) needs adult HIPAA. Decision needed on guardian selection — flagged.

estimate.narrative_context: Federal estate tax saved at 40% on $3.04M of cumulative annual exclusion gifts over 20 years to 4 donees (3 children + Marcus's mother Eleanor); excludes compound growth outside estate

scenario_range.computation_method: Low: $3.04M cumulative × 40%; High: includes 7% compound growth on gifted assets outside estate over 20 years

action_items.description: Identify donees and confirm gifting vehicles (direct, Crummey trusts).
Calendar annual gifts for January each year capturing full exclusion immediately.
Coordinate Crummey notice mechanics with trustee for gifts to children's trusts.

recommendations._audit_notes: 4 donees: 3 children + Eleanor. $19K × 2 × 4 = $152K/yr capacity. 20-year horizon assumed.

estimate.narrative_context: Federal estate tax avoided at 40% on $9M ILIT-owned death benefit (estimated $5M buy/sell + $4M estate liquidity); face amounts pending insurance underwriting

scenario_range.computation_method: Range based on $5M-$12M ILIT-owned face × 40% estate tax rate

ILIT obtains EIN and opens trust bank account.
ILIT applies for and owns the new policy from inception (avoids §2035 3-year lookback).

estimate.narrative_context: Cumulative estate-tax savings as the receiving vehicle for annual exclusion gifts, GRAT remainder, IDGT distributions, and compound growth outside estate

scenario_range.computation_method: Aggregate estate-tax savings across all transfer vehicles funneling into children's trusts

action_items.description: Decide between per-child trusts (3 trusts) or single pot trust structure.
Estate attorney drafts trust documents with HEMS standard to age 35, broader thereafter; Crummey provisions.
Select corporate trustee; obtain trust EIN(s) and open trust account(s).
Establish Crummey notice procedures and contribution program coordination with REC-EST-003.

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Annual trustee report and Crummey cycle review: {{description_short}}

recommendations._audit_notes: Per-child vs pot trust is values-driven decision pending. Corporate trustee strongly recommended. Hard rule: no unrestricted access before age 35.

estimate.narrative_context: Value transferred to children's trusts free of gift tax over 3-year GRAT term assuming 18%/year business growth vs 5.0% §7520 hurdle (May 2026); §7520 rate locks at funding

scenario_range.computation_method: Low: business stalls and assets revert (asymmetric); Mid: 18% growth (Holloway base case); High: growth exceeds 18% or transaction event during term

action_items.description: Confirm prerequisites complete: F-reorg (REC-ENT-002), recap (REC-ENT-003), qualified appraisal of non-voting interest.
Estate attorney drafts 3-year zeroed-out (Walton) GRAT document.
CPA runs Walton-zeroed annuity calculation at §7520 rate at funding (currently 5.0% May 2026).
Fund GRAT with appraised non-voting interest (~$8.2M after-discount tranche).
Coordinate annuity payment schedule with attorney and CPA over 3-year term.
sub_steps: In-kind payment FMV documentation if applicable

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Check in with {{partner_type}} on GRAT annuity milestones: {{description_short}}

recommendations._audit_notes: §7520 5.0% sourced from May 2026 volatile_rates_lookup. Marcus excellent health supports 3-year mortality assumption. GRAT is asymmetric: heads I win, tails I tie.

estimate.narrative_context: Additional value transferred to trust beneficiaries via IDGT installment sale at AFR over 9-year note plus transaction event; income-tax-burn paid by grantor adds further estate reduction. Mid-term/long-term AFR pending May 2026 IRS publication; estimated at ~4.5%.

scenario_range.computation_method: Low/mid: 9-year note repayment with modest growth; high: transaction event during note + income-tax-burn cumulative additional gift effect

action_items.description: Establish IDGT with §675(4) substitute power triggering grantor trust status; or use existing children's trust if structured as IDGT.
Make seed gift of ~10% of intended sale value (~$1.75M) using lifetime exemption; file Form 709.
Obtain qualified appraisal of non-voting interest at sale.
Execute sale documents: unit purchase agreement and AFR-bearing installment note (9-year term).
CPA tax memo confirming grantor-trust status and §1014 basis treatment.
Administer annual note interest payments and grantor-trust filings over 9-year term.

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Confirm with {{partner_type}} that IDGT note interest paid and grantor trust filing complete: {{description_short}}

recommendations._audit_notes: AFR for May 2026 not published in volatile_rates_lookup AFR table (marked VERIFY); using ~4.5% estimate per Holloway plan reference. AFR should be confirmed at execution. Sequenced after GRAT per rec file.

estimate.narrative_context: Federal estate tax avoided on $5M SLAT funding growing at 7%/year over 25 years to ~$27M, 40% estate tax avoided

scenario_range.computation_method: Range based on $3M-$10M exemption use × 7% growth × 25-30 yr horizon × 40%

action_items.description: Confirm both spouses understand SLAT survives divorce (irrevocable, ex-spouse retains beneficiary status).
Estate attorney drafts SLAT with HEMS distributions to spouse + children, independent trustee, §2036-avoidance drafting.
Select funding asset (appreciating asset preferred); fund SLAT and file Form 709 documenting exemption use.
Annual trustee accounting and beneficiary distribution administration.

recommendations._audit_notes: Catherine and Marcus both US citizens, married since long-stable marriage; SLAT viable. If both spouses do SLATs, must avoid reciprocal trust doctrine — sequence and differentiate substantively. Decision needed on which spouse funds and amount.

estimate.narrative_context: GST tax avoidance on $30M GST exemption allocation growing at 5%/yr over 60 years to ~$560M; 40% GST tax otherwise applies at child-to-grandchild transfer

scenario_range.computation_method: Range reflects sensitivity to growth rate (3-7%) and horizon (40-80 yrs)

action_items.description: Estate attorney drafts GST-exempt trust language for children's trusts and other irrevocable vehicles.
Decide trust situs: Georgia (RAP applies, limited duration) vs Delaware/SD/NV (true dynasty).
CPA files Form 709 with explicit GST exemption allocation at each funding event.

action_items.description: Track inclusion ratio across all trust funding events to maintain GST-exempt status.

recommendations._audit_notes: Trust situs decision (GA vs DE/SD/NV) coordinates with REC-SPC-001. $30M couple GST allocation potentially over many decades shields very large amounts.

estimate.narrative_context: Estate-tax savings on Blue Ridge vacation home QPRT (12-year term, §7520 5.0% May 2026): residence appreciates outside estate after term, residual gift only ~$400K of exemption used

scenario_range.computation_method: Low: mortality during term ruins benefit; mid: 12-year term, 4% appreciation; high: longer horizon and stronger appreciation

Estate attorney drafts QPRT with proper §2702 qualifications.

Re-deed residence to QPRT and file Form 709 reporting gift of remainder interest.
At term end (year 12), execute FMV lease agreement or move; ongoing rent payment to children's trusts.

quantified_impact.qualitative_phrasing: Beneficiary designation audit prevents probate, family disputes, and loss of stretch benefits; savings vary by asset and scenario but address the most-overlooked failure point in estate planning.

action_items.description: Inventory all accounts with beneficiary designations: 401(k), IRAs, life insurance, annuities, TOD/POD accounts, HSA.
Pull current beneficiary designations from each custodian and compare against current estate plan.
Submit updated designations via each custodian's form; coordinate trust see-through language with attorney for retirement accounts.
Retain confirmation receipts and maintain central beneficiary log; schedule annual review.
